reviews.comment:
Al haber mucha gente la atencion baja michisimo, tardan bastante, no tenian media luna y era un domingo a las 10 de la mañana.

(Translated by Google)
Because there were so many people, the service was extremely slow, they took a long time, they didn't have any crescent rolls and it was 10 am on a Sunday.
